info.title: Lendaswap API
info.description: Seamlessly swap between BTC and Stables on Ethereum/Polygon/etc

get.summary: Get the delegate cosigner public key.
get.description:
Clients need this key when preparing delegate PSBTs so the backend
can participate in the batch ceremony as a cosigner.

post.description:
The client prepares and signs delegate PSBTs (intent + forfeits), then
POSTs them here. The backend reconstructs the `Delegate` struct and runs
the full Ark batch ceremony on the client's behalf.

This endpoint blocks until the batch completes (~10-30s).

get.summary: Get available EVM tokens from 1inch for supported chains

parameters.name: chain_id
parameters.description: Filter by EVM chain ID (1=Ethereum, 137=Polygon, 42161=Arbitrum). Omit for all chains.

200.description: EVM tokens grouped by chain ID

get.summary: Return the current cached Median Time Past (MTP) and tip height.

200.description: Return the current MTP and tip height

503.description: MTP not available yet (cache not populated)

get.summary: Get a quote for swapping BTC to/from EVM tokens
get.description:
Specify exactly one of source_amount or target_amount.
Amounts are in the smallest unit of the respective token (satoshis for BTC, raw units for EVM
tokens).

parameters.name: source_token
parameters.description: Source token: contract address for EVM tokens, or "btc" for BTC

parameters.name: target_token
parameters.description: Target token: contract address for EVM tokens, or "btc" for BTC

parameters.name: source_amount
parameters.description: Amount in smallest unit of source token (mutually exclusive with target_amount)

parameters.name: target_amount
parameters.description: Amount in smallest unit of target token (mutually exclusive with source_amount)

200.description: Return a quote for swapping BTC to/from EVM tokens

post.summary: Create a new Bitcoin (on-chain) to Arkade swap request
post.description:
The user provides an on-chain BTC amount to swap and receives Arkade VTXOs.
Flow:
1. User sends BTC to the Taproot HTLC address returned
2. After 1 confirmation, server creates Arkade VHTLC for user
3. User claims Arkade VHTLC with secret, revealing it
4. Server claims on-chain BTC with the revealed secret

Flow:
1. User provides their Lightning invoice (they want to receive BTC)
2. Server prepares Boltz submarine swap to pay the invoice
3. User funds EVM HTLCErc20 with tokens
4. Server pays Lightning invoice via Boltz (gets preimage)
5. Server claims EVM HTLCErc20 using preimage

post.summary: Recover swaps by deriving user_id keys from an Xpub
post.description:
This endpoint allows clients to recover their swap history after importing a mnemonic. The
client provides an Xpub they used to derive `user_id`s, and the server derives `user_id` keys at
m/9419/121923/<index> for indices 0-99 and searches for matching swaps.

get.summary: Get swap status and details by ID

post.summary: Claims an EVM-targeted swap gaslessly via the HTLCCoordinator contract.
post.description:
Supports both Arkade-to-EVM and Bitcoin-to-EVM swaps. The server submits
`coordinator.redeemAndExecute` on the client's behalf, using the client's
EIP-712 signature and secret.

200.description: Swap claimed successfully via gasless execution

400.description: Bad request - swap not found or in wrong state

get.summary: Returns fresh 1inch DEX calldata for an EVM-targeted swap (Arkade-to-EVM or Bitcoin-to-EVM).
get.description:
The calldata is generated with `receiver = destination` so that 1inch
sends the output tokens directly to the user's address, avoiding an
extra sweep transfer.

parameters.name: destination
parameters.description: EVM destination address for output tokens

200.description: Fresh DEX calldata with gasless fee estimate

get.summary: Returns calldata to refund an expired EVM-to-Arkade HTLC via the coordinator.
get.description:
Two modes:
- `mode=swap-back` (default): calls `refundAndExecute` — refund WBTC from expired HTLC, swap
  WBTC → source token via 1inch, sweep to caller.
- `mode=direct`: calls `refundTo` — refund WBTC directly to caller (no DEX).

Both are permissionless after the timelock expires.

get.summary: Returns the calldata needed to fund an EVM-to-Arkade swap via the HTLCCoordinator.
get.description:
The coordinator atomically:
1. Pulls source tokens from the user via `transferFrom`
2. Approves the 1inch router to spend the source tokens
3. Swaps source tokens to WBTC via 1inch
4. Locks the WBTC into an HTLC

The caller must first approve the source token to the **coordinator** address.

get.summary: Get list of available tokens for swaps.
get.description:
Optionally pass `source_chain` + `source_token` **or** `target_chain` + `target_token`
to filter the response to valid counterparty tokens.

parameters.name: source_chain
parameters.description: If set together with `source_token`, return only valid target tokens.

parameters.name: target_chain
parameters.description: If set together with `target_token`, return only valid source tokens.

200.description: Return list of available tokens for swaps

get.summary: Return the current git tag and commit hash.

200.description: Return the deployed version and commit hash

ArkadeToEvmSwapRequest.description:
Chain-agnostic request for Arkade-to-EVM swaps.

The caller specifies the target chain via `evm_chain_id` and the token
via its ERC-20 contract `token_address`. This endpoint supports any token
reachable through 1inch aggregation (which covers Uniswap, Curve, etc.).

amount_in.description:
How many sats the user wants to send (mutually exclusive with `amount_out`).
Value is in satoshis (smallest BTC unit).

amount_out.description:
How much target token the user wants to receive (mutually exclusive with `amount_in`).
Value is in the target token's smallest unit (e.g. for USDC with 6 decimals, 1000000 = 1
USDC).

claiming_address.description: EVM address that will sign the HTLC claim (SDK-derived for gasless claims).

gasless.description:
Whether the server should execute the DEX swap on behalf of the user (gasless claim).
When true, the gasless network fee is added to the total fee charged.
Defaults to true.

hash_lock.description: Hash lock provided by the client (32-byte hex string with 0x prefix).

refund_pk.description: Refund public key used to generate the Arkade VHTLC.

target_address.description: EVM address where tokens are swept after the claim (user's final destination).

token_address.description: ERC-20 contract address of the desired token on the target chain.

user_id.description: User ID derived from wallet for recovery purposes.

client_evm_address.description: EVM address that will sign the HTLC claim (SDK-derived for gasless claims).

target_evm_address.description: EVM address where tokens are swept after the claim (user's final destination).

wbtc_address.description: WBTC token contract address on the target EVM chain (the token locked in the HTLC).

claim_pk.description: User's claim public key for the Arkade VHTLC

hash_lock.description:
Hash lock provided by the client (20-byte hex string, no 0x prefix).
The client generates a secret and computes HASH160(secret) = RIPEMD160(SHA256(secret)).
This hash is used for both the on-chain Bitcoin HTLC (OP_HASH160) and the Arkade VHTLC.
Client will use the secret to claim the Arkade VHTLC later.

referral_code.description: Optional referral code for fee exemption

refund_pk.description: User's refund public key for the on-chain Bitcoin HTLC

sats_receive.description: Amount the user wants to receive on Arkade in satoshis

target_arkade_address.description: User's target Arkade address to receive VTXOs

user_id.description: User ID derived from wallet for recovery purposes

BitcoinToEvmSwapRequest.description:
Chain-agnostic request for Arkade-to-EVM swaps.

The caller specifies the target chain via `evm_chain_id` and the token
via its ERC-20 contract `token_address`. This endpoint supports any token
reachable through 1inch aggregation (which covers Uniswap, Curve, etc.).

amount_in.description:
How many sats the user wants to send (mutually exclusive with `amount_out`).
Value is in satoshis (smallest BTC unit).

amount_out.description:
How much target token the user wants to receive (mutually exclusive with `amount_in`).
Value is in the target token's smallest unit (e.g. for USDC with 6 decimals, 1000000 = 1
USDC).

claiming_address.description: EVM address that will sign the HTLC claim (SDK-derived for gasless claims).

gasless.description:
Whether the server should execute the DEX swap on behalf of the user (gasless claim).
When true, the gasless network fee is added to the total fee charged.
Defaults to true.

hash_lock.description: Hash lock provided by the client (32-byte hex string with 0x prefix).

refund_pk.description: Refund public key used to generate the Arkade VHTLC.

target_address.description: EVM address where tokens are swept after the claim (user's final destination).

token_address.description: ERC-20 contract address of the desired token on the target chain.

user_id.description: User ID derived from wallet for recovery purposes.

btc_hash_lock.description:
Hash lock (20-byte hex)

To be used for bitcoin htlc. This is the [`ripemd160(evm_hash_lock)`]

btc_htlc_address.description: On-chain Bitcoin HTLC P2WSH address (user sends BTC here)

btc_server_pk.description: The server's pk inside the htlc

client_evm_address.description: EVM address that will sign the HTLC claim (SDK-derived for gasless claims)

created_at.description: Timestamp of when the swap was created

evm_claim_txid.description: EVM HTLC claim transaction ID (user claim)

evm_expected_sats.description: Amount of WBTC sats locked in the EVM HTLC

evm_hash_lock.description:
Hash lock (32-byte hex)

To be used for EVM htlc

source_amount.description: Amount user must send in satoshis

target_amount.description: How much the user will receive in the target token's smallest unit

target_evm_address.description: EVM address where tokens are swept after the claim (user's final destination)

wbtc_address.description: WBTC token contract address on the target EVM chain (the token locked in the HTLC)

arkade_claim_txid.description: Arkade VHTLC claim transaction ID (user claim)

asset_amount.description:
Amount user must send in satoshis
Deprecated: please use [`target_amount`]

btc_htlc_address.description: On-chain Bitcoin HTLC P2WSH address (user sends BTC here)

created_at.description: Timestamp of when the swap was created

sats_receive.description: Amount user will receive on Arkade in satoshis

server_vhtlc_pk.description: Server's VHTLC public key (sender in the VHTLC)

source_amount.description: Amount user must send in satoshis

unilateral_refund_without_receiver_delay.description: Unilateral refund without receiver delay in seconds

sats_receive.description:
The amount of satoshis we expect to receive
Deprecated: please use [`source_amount`]

source_amount.description: Amount user must send in satoshis

target_amount.description: Amount the user will receive of the target asset

user_address_evm.description: User's EVM address to receive tokens

Chain.description:
Supported blockchain networks.
EVM chains serialize to their chain ID as a string (e.g. "137" for Polygon).

destination.description: EVM address where tokens should be sent

oneOf.description:
Optional DEX calldata from the client. If provided, the server uses this
instead of fetching from 1inch. Client should fetch via
`GET /swap/{id}/redeem-and-swap-calldata?destination=...`

r.description: EIP-712 signature r (32-byte hex string, with or without 0x prefix)

s.description: EIP-712 signature s (32-byte hex string, with or without 0x prefix)

secret.description: The secret/preimage (32-byte hex string, with or without 0x prefix)

cosigner_pk.description: Hex-encoded compressed public key of the delegate cosigner.

client_pk.description: Client's public key for the VHTLC

vtxos.description: List of VTXO outpoints to refresh

DexCallData.description: DEX swap calldata for the coordinator contract.

DexCalldata.description: DEX calldata for the swap (from 1inch or another aggregator)

data.description: Encoded swap calldata (hex string, with or without 0x prefix)

vtxos.description: List of VTXO outpoints to refresh ("txid:vout" format)

expected_vtxo_expiry.description:
Expected expiry timestamp (Unix) of the resulting VTXOs.
This is the minimum expiry among the server's VTXOs that will be used to fund the swap.

EvmToArkadeGenericSwapRequest.description:
Request to create an EVM-to-Arkade swap.

User sends any ERC-20 token on EVM, receives BTC on Arkade.

amount_in.description: Source token amount in smallest units (mutually exclusive with `amount_out`).

amount_out.description: Desired BTC output in sats (mutually exclusive with `amount_in`).

hash_lock.description: Hash lock (0x-prefixed 32-byte hex). Client generates secret, computes SHA256(secret).

target_address.description: Arkade address where the user wants to receive BTC.

token_address.description: ERC-20 contract address of the source token on the EVM chain.

user_address.description: User's EVM address (sender of the ERC-20 token).

user_id.description: User ID derived from wallet for recovery purposes.

EvmToBitcoinSwapRequest.description:
Request to create an EVM-to-Bitcoin swap.

User sends any ERC-20 token on EVM, receives on-chain BTC (Taproot HTLC).
The caller specifies the source chain via `evm_chain_id` and the token
via its ERC-20 contract `token_address`.

amount_in.description: Source token amount in smallest units (mutually exclusive with `amount_out`).

amount_out.description: Desired BTC output in sats (mutually exclusive with `amount_in`).

claim_pk.description: User's BTC public key for claiming BTC from the on-chain Taproot HTLC.

hash_lock.description: Hash lock (0x-prefixed 32-byte hex). Client generates secret, computes SHA256(secret).

target_address.description: User's target BTC address to receive claimed funds.

token_address.description: ERC-20 contract address of the source token on the EVM chain.

user_address.description: User's EVM address (sender of the ERC-20 token).

user_id.description: User ID derived from wallet for recovery purposes.

btc_hash_lock.description: BTC hash lock (RIPEMD160 of EVM hash lock)

btc_htlc_address.description: On-chain BTC Taproot HTLC address (server creates, user claims)

btc_server_refund_pk.description: Server's x-only public key for refunding BTC

btc_user_claim_pk.description: User's x-only public key for claiming BTC

client_evm_address.description: User's EVM address (funds the EVM HTLC)

evm_expected_sats.description: Expected WBTC amount (in sats) on EVM

evm_htlc_address.description: EVM HTLC contract address (user creates, server claims)

server_evm_address.description: Server's EVM address (claims the EVM HTLC)

source_amount.description: Source token amount in smallest units

target_amount.description: Expected BTC amount (in sats) user will receive

target_btc_address.description: User's target BTC address for receiving claimed funds

wbtc_address.description: WBTC token contract address on the EVM chain

gelato_user_nonce.description: Gelato user nonce for replay protection

sats_receive.description:
Net satoshis user will receive
Deprecated: please use [`target_amount`]

source_amount.description: Amount user must send of the source asset

source_token_address.description: ERC20 token address for approve target

target_amount.description: Amount the user will receive in sats

user_address_arkade.description: User's Arkade address to receive BTC (optional)

EvmToLightningSwapRequest.description:
Request to create an EVM-to-Lightning swap.

User sends any ERC-20 token on EVM, receives BTC via Lightning.
The hash_lock is derived from the Lightning invoice's payment hash.

lightning_invoice.description:
User's Lightning BOLT11 invoice to receive payment.
The payment hash from this invoice becomes the HTLC hash_lock.

token_address.description: ERC-20 contract address of the source token on the EVM chain.

user_address.description: User's EVM address (sender of the ERC-20 token).

user_id.description: User ID derived from wallet for recovery purposes.

client_lightning_invoice.description: User's Lightning invoice to receive payment

lightning_paid.description: Whether the Lightning payment has been made

LightningToEvmSwapRequest.description:
Chain-agnostic request for Lightning-to-EVM swaps.

The caller specifies the target chain via `evm_chain_id` and the token
via its ERC-20 contract `token_address`. This endpoint supports any token
reachable through 1inch aggregation.

amount_in.description:
How many sats the user wants to send (mutually exclusive with `amount_out`).
Value is in satoshis (smallest BTC unit).

amount_out.description:
How much target token the user wants to receive (mutually exclusive with `amount_in`).
Value is in the target token's smallest unit (e.g. for USDC with 6 decimals, 1000000 = 1
USDC).

claiming_address.description: EVM address that will sign the HTLC claim (SDK-derived for gasless claims).

gasless.description:
Whether the server should execute the DEX swap on behalf of the user (gasless claim).
When true, the gasless network fee is added to the total fee charged.
Defaults to true.

hash_lock.description: Hash lock provided by the client (32-byte hex string with 0x prefix).

refund_pk.description: Refund public key used to generate the Arkade VHTLC.

target_address.description: EVM address where tokens are swept after the claim (user's final destination).

token_address.description: ERC-20 contract address of the desired token on the target chain.

user_id.description: User ID derived from wallet for recovery purposes.

btc_claim_txid.description: Server's claim transaction ID on Arkade (Boltz VHTLC claim)

client_evm_address.description: EVM address that will sign the HTLC claim

target_evm_address.description: EVM address where tokens are swept after the claim

wbtc_address.description: WBTC token contract address on the target EVM chain

mtp.description: The Median Time Past (Unix timestamp in seconds).

tip_height.description: The tip block height when MTP was last calculated.

tier_1.description: Price per BTC when swapping 1 unit of the quote asset

tier_100.description: Price per BTC when swapping 100 units of the quote asset

tier_1000.description: Price per BTC when swapping 1,000 units of the quote asset

tier_5000.description: Price per BTC when swapping 5,000 units of the quote asset

PriceUpdateMessage.description: WebSocket message containing tiered prices for all trading pairs

pairs.description: List of trading pairs with their tiered prices

exchange_rate.description: Exchange rate: how much of the EVM token you get/pay per BTC

gasless_network_fee.description:
Gasless network fee estimate (in satoshis) — covers the additional gas
the server pays to execute the DEX swap on behalf of the user
(redeemAndExecute via the coordinator contract).

max_amount.description: Maximum swap amount in satoshis (lesser of: config max or 90% of available balance)

min_amount.description: Minimum swap amount in satoshis (from config)

network_fee.description:
Network fee estimate (in satoshis) — covers server-paid gas for HTLC
create/claim + BTC mining fee when applicable.

source_amount.description: Pre-calculated source amount in smallest unit of source token

target_amount.description: Pre-calculated target amount in smallest unit of target token

index.description: The derivation index used for this swap

xpub.description:
Extended public key derived from the user's wallet.

Used to derive `user_id`s for that user.

highest_index.description:
The highest index used in any recovered swap.

Client should set their next derivation index to this + 1.

swaps.description: List of recovered swaps with their derivation indices

RedeemAndSwapResponse.description: Response containing fresh DEX calldata and the gasless fee that will be deducted at claim time.

gasless_fee_sats.description:
Gasless fee in WBTC sats, estimated at calldata-fetch time.
The claim endpoint will deduct this from the HTLC amount via a WBTC transfer.

RefundCalldataResponse.description: Response containing refund calldata for an EVM-to-Arkade swap.

calldata.description: ABI-encoded calldata for the refund call on the coordinator

cosigner_pk.description: Hex-encoded compressed cosigner public key (must match our static key).

forfeit_psbts.description: List of base64-encoded partial forfeit PSBTs (signed with SIGHASH_ALL|ANYONECANPAY).

intent_proof.description: Base64-encoded intent proof PSBT (signed by the VTXO owner).

preimage.description: Optional hex-encoded preimage (the HTLC secret). Required together with `swap_id`.

swap_id.description:
Optional swap ID. When provided alongside `preimage`, the backend marks the
swap as ClientRedeemed so the EVM claimer can proceed.

commitment_txid.description: Commitment transaction ID from the batch settlement.

SwapCommonFields.description: Common fields shared across all swap directions

asset_amount.description:
For evm-btc swaps, this is the source asset amount, for btc-evm swaps, this is the target
asset amount Deprecated

created_at.description: Timestamp of when the swap was created

evm_refund_locktime.description: Timestamp past which refund is permitted on the EVM chain

hash_lock.description: Hash lock for the HTLC (32-byte hex string with 0x prefix)

unilateral_claim_delay.description: Relative timelock for claim in seconds

unilateral_refund_delay.description: Relative timelock for refund in seconds

unilateral_refund_without_receiver_delay.description: Relative timelock for refund without receiver in seconds

vhtlc_refund_locktime.description: Timestamp past which refund is permitted on Arkade

SwapStatus.description:
Atomic swap state machine for BTC --> Target Asset swaps using HTLCs.

# Overview

This enum tracks the state of an atomic swap between Bitcoin (via Lightning/Arkade)
and Target Asset (on Polygon, Ethereum, etc). The swap uses Hash Time-Locked Contracts (HTLCs)
to ensure atomicity without requiring trust.

# Normal Flow

```text
Pending → ClientFunded → ServerFunded → ClientRedeemed → ServerRedeemed
```

1. Client creates swap request → `Pending`
2. Client sends BTC → `ClientFunded`
3. Server locks WBTC in Polygon HTLC → `ServerFunded`
4. Client reveals secret to claim Target Asset → `ClientRedeemed`
5. Server uses secret to claim BTC → `ServerRedeemed` (terminal)

# Refund Flows

```text
Pending → Expired (no funding)
ClientFunded → ClientRefunded (client refunds before server funds)
ServerFunded → ClientFundedServerRefunded (HTLC timeout)
```

# State Diagram

See `swap_states.md` for a complete state diagram and detailed documentation.

# Security

- Bitcoin HTLC timeout must be longer than Polygon HTLC timeout
- Secret becomes public when client claims TargetAsset on Polygon
- `ClientRefundedServerFunded` is an error state that should never occur

pair.description:
Trading pair identifier (e.g., "USDC_POL-BTC" or "USDT0_POL-BTC")
kept for backwards compatibility, equals [`source`]-[`target`]

tiers.description: Price tiers for different swap amounts

VtxoSwapStatus.description:
VTXO Swap state machine for BTC-to-BTC (Arkade refresh) swaps.

# Overview

This enum tracks the state of a VTXO refresh swap where users exchange
old VTXOs for new ones with refreshed expiry times.

# Normal Flow

```text
Pending -> ClientFunded -> ServerFunded -> ClientRedeemed -> ServerRedeemed
```

1. Swap created -> `Pending`
2. Client funds their VHTLC -> `ClientFunded`
3. Server funds their VHTLC -> `ServerFunded`
4. Client claims server's VHTLC (reveals preimage) -> `ClientRedeemed`
5. Server claims client's VHTLC -> `ServerRedeemed` (terminal)

# Refund Flows

```text
Pending -> Expired (no funding)
ClientFunded -> ClientRefunded (server didn't fund in time)
ServerFunded -> ClientFundedServerRefunded (client didn't claim in time)
```
